name: clean-wiki
description: Monthly Obsidian vault cleanup skill with local review UI and approval-gated edits.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Obsidian vaults with a local approval UI.
interface.longDescription: Clean-Wiki scans configured Obsidian vaults through the active agent, queues cleanup findings, opens a local review UI, and applies only explicitly approved changes with an undo log.
defaultPrompt: Use $clean-wiki to audit my Obsidian vaults.
